functional.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow for automated dashboard builds.
Build and push Docker image for the dashboard to a registry.
Automate deployment to staging and implement manual promotion to production.
Implement and test a rollback strategy.

nonFunctional.description: All deployments must be logged and traceable.

assumptions.description: Required secrets (Docker registry, deployment keys) are available in GitHub settings.

domainModel.description: Automated series of steps to build/test/deploy.

interactions.description: Code Push -> Build -> Test -> Docker Push -> Deploy Staging -> Approval -> Deploy Production.

edgeCases.handling: Alert on Slack/Email and block further steps; keep old version running.

terminology.definition: A deployment strategy with two identical environments for zero-downtime releases.
